titleStmt.title: SII 17.220: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 220. (A.R. No. 198 of 1904.) TIRUVAKKARAI, VILUPPURAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east base of the gōpura of the first prākāra of the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.

The titles of Śāḷuva Narasiṅgadēva are given as Śrīman Mahāmaṇḍalīśvaraṉ mēdiṉimīśuragaṇḍa Kaṭṭāri. This inscription is dated on the 28th day in Kārttigai of Śōbhakṛit which will correspond to 1483 A.D., November 26. Narasā-Nāyaka (evidently of the Tuḷuva family) is mentioned in this record as an agent of the king.

This records an order of Narasa-Nāyaka exempting the dēvaḍiyār of god Āḷuḍaiya nayiṉār of Tiruvakkarai from the payment of kalattuṭṭi as Karaikkāṭṭu-ppaṟṟu and Śeṅgāṭṭu-ppaṟṟu were not included in Kōliyanallūr Śīmai (Tiruvakkarai was perhaps included in one of the above two paṟṟus).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvatti . śrīmaṉmākāmaṇṭalīcuraṉ metiṉi mīcurakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva cāḷuva
naraciṅkateva mākādhīrācāviṉ kāriyattukku kaṭavar naracā nāyakkar
copakiṟi varuṣam kāttikaimātam 2 10 8� tiruvakkarai Āḷuṭaiya nayiṉār koyil tevaṭiyār kalattuṭaṭi
yiṟuttu vanta mutal(na) karaikkāṭṭuppaṟṟu ceṅkāṭṭup paṟṟu koliyanallūr cimaiyil
Illātapaṭiyāle Ivarkaḷukku Inta kalattuṭṭi paṇam kaḻitta Aḷavukku Inta kala
ttuṭṭi paṇam cantira Ātittavaraiyum koḷḷakkaṭavatu Allavākavum Inta kalattuṭṭi
paṇattukku yātoruvaṉ Akutam paṇṇiṉavaṉ keṅkai karaiil kārāmpacuvai
yum pirāmaṇaṉaiyum koṉṟa pāvattille pokakkaṭavaṉ Ākavum
Digital edition of SII 17.220 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
